Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

If no balance between material and spiritual life - one become mad?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-08-21 · 5 answers
Is some vers in SB, where is mentioned, that if one has no balance between his material and spiritual life became mad? Thankyou
user [38] · 2007-08-21
Any context? Possibly 6.7.21, 7.7.33 or 10.73.18 and on but they are not exactly speaking about balance.
user [112] · 2007-08-21
Thank U, I have no context, Purnananda pr. had this question, I just told him, I will ask here :)
user [38] · 2007-08-21
Greetings and namaskars to him. ;)
user [2] · 2007-08-21
there is a reference (I think on Srila Bhaktivinodas Jaiva Dharma) that has to be a balance of 5 aspects in life (something like mental, social, etc) to be able to advance in spiritual life. I will try to find the quote. VEDA hold your horses :)
user [140] · 2007-08-21
..possibly,or at least they will be easy prey for MAYA, you cannot sit on the fence for-ever.
